name: mem_kv
metric: peak traced bytes while serving queries
score_tolerance_note: the serving high-water mark (retained store + per-query transient) can sit near a pymalloc pool boundary, giving a ~59-byte flicker; low-variance, not bit-exact
tolerant_metrics_note: only the memory-byte metrics get score_tolerance on verify --rescore; invariant counts (n_pairs, n_queries) must match exactly
